mapper.select:
SELECT u.id, u.username, u.real_name, u.phone, u.email, u.avatar, u.gender, u.status, u.dept_id, u.last_login_time, u.last_login_ip, u.create_by, u.create_time, u.update_by, u.update_time, u.remark, r.id AS role_id, r.role_name FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE u.deleted = 0
AND u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%')
AND u.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{realName}, '%')
AND u.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{phone}, '%')
AND u.status = #{status}
ORDER BY u.create_time DESC
